title: Copilot availability on SKU's below F64
author: Ahan
text:
I saw that to get Copilot, at least the preview, for Fabric, we should have a minimum of F64. Is it true for GA as well or will Copilot be available at lower SKUs (F32) at that time ?
Another question, apart from Copilot and ability to publish reports which can be viewed by free users, are there other features which are available with F64 and above, which are not available at lower tiers ?
